findings.claim: FY2025 revenue, EBIT, NPAT, operating cash flow, cash, and dividend per share from CLINUVEL's FY2025 financial summary/annual report
findings.notes: Headline FY2025 figures are from company financial summary/search snippet; page itself is official investor IR. Exact balance-sheet items were not captured in the fetch text.

findings.claim: FY2024 revenue, EBIT margin, NPAT, and operating cash flow from CLINUVEL's FY2024 financial summary
findings.notes: EBIT is estimated from the disclosed 57% margin and revenue. Official summary appears to present margin rather than absolute EBIT in the snippet.

findings.claim: FY2023 revenue and cash flow from the annual report/results, plus NPAT and total revenue/other income
findings.notes: Search snippet indicates revenues and other income of A$83.0m and NPAT A$30.6m. The 'revenue' field in snippets is also shown as A$96.3m in an annual report result, so there is a presentation difference between revenue and revenue+other income.

findings.claim: FY2022 revenue, EBIT/PBIT, NPAT, operating cash flow, cash, dividend, and shares on issue from CLINUVEL's FY2022 results release
findings.source_title: Revenue Growth Drives CLINUVEL's Sixth Consecutive Annual Profit - CLINUVEL
findings.notes: Official results release snippet provides the requested metrics directly. Dividend is fully franked per the release snippet.

findings.claim: FY2021 revenue, operating cash flow, and cash balance from CLINUVEL's FY2021 annual report/results
findings.notes: Search snippet contains revenue, EBIT/PBIT, NPAT, operating cash flow, cash, and dividend per share. FY2021 absolute EBIT/NPAT are presented in the snippet and company release.

findings.claim: FY2024 and FY2023 geographic revenue mix is disclosed by primary geographical markets in the annual reports
findings.notes: Geographic mix values were surfaced in official-report search snippets and should be treated as official but not fully re-verified from the PDF text extraction.

findings.claim: CLINUVEL shares on issue are currently 50,123,630 per company snapshot
findings.notes: Current shares on issue from official investor snapshot; differs from FY2022 year-end shares on issue.

not_found: A clean FY2020-FY2024 or FY2021-FY2025 five-year table with all metrics in a single official company table was not located in accessible text; metrics had to be assembled from multiple official annual reports/results releases.
FY2024 and FY2025 exact cash and debt/borrowings balances were not reliably extracted from the PDF text fetch.
FY2020 historical figures were not located, so the table is anchored on FY2021-FY2025.
A definitive year-by-year geographic revenue mix for FY2021-FY2022 and FY2025 was not located in accessible text.

contradictions.source_b_claim: Snippet shows revenues and other income A$83.0 million.
contradictions.notes: Likely different definitions/presentations (revenue vs revenues plus other income). Use the same metric definition consistently when building the model.

summary: I assembled a five-year set for CLINUVEL largely from official annual reports/results releases. FY2022 is the cleanest year for the requested operating metrics, while FY2024-FY2025 are mostly captured from the company financial summary and FY2023 has a presentation split between revenue and revenues+other income that should be normalized before direct comparison.
